pkgmetadata.longdescription: Bottles is a free and open source application that allows you to easily manage Wine and Proton prefixes. It provides a clean GTK4/Libadwaita interface to create, manage, and run Windows applications and games on Linux, with support for different runners, DXVK, VKD3D, and more.

use.flag: Enable support for Feral Interactive's GameMode daemon to optimise system performance during gaming sessions.
Pull in app-emulation/vkd3d-proton for DirectX 12 over Vulkan translation.
Pull in media-libs/vulkan-loader for Vulkan rendering support.
